configurations.name: design-system
runtimeArgs: require('http').createServer((req,res)=>{const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');let f=path.join('/Users/anaghmirji/Documents/Claude Code #1',req.url==='/'?'/index.html':req.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found')}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const t={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','json':'application/json'}[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain';res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':t});res.end(d)}})}).listen(3000,()=>console.log('Server running on port 3000'))
